metadata.description: Scans Reddit for high-signal pain points

config.instructions: Execute Arena Deployment: Scan target subreddits for recurring business pain points, 'manual task' complaints, or operational fragility.

metadata.description: Qualifies pain points via automated audits

config.instructions: Perform evidence-based audits on harvested data. Calculate PIS (Pain Intensity Score) and qualify the 'Revenue Leak' potential.

metadata.description: Generates MVP Blueprints and NotebookLM assets

config.instructions: Synthesize a SaaS MVP Blueprint. Generate a 100% tailored NotebookLM pitch asset illustrating the solution and the 'Operational Relief' it provides.

metadata.description: Executes outreach and monitors for response

config.instructions: Execute outreach via the Neural Relay. Monitor for triggers like 'BLUEPRINT' or 'YES' to advance the sequence.

metadata.description: Final quality gate and lineage logger

config.instructions: Log final lineage and PIS traction scores to .mira/scores/saas_pls_performance.json.
